Hardship.name: Hardship
Hardship.imageprompt: A badge featuring a simple dark cloud with raindrops falling over a small cobblestone path, flat minimalist vector illustration, clean cozy aesthetic, simplified shapes, soft muted colors. The badge is contained inside a plain circle with a pastel light blue background. The image background outside the circle is a matching pastel light blue color. Both backgrounds should be the same pastel light blue shade.
